raw.title: What Separates The Great From The Petty In History
raw.excerpt: The post What Separates The Great From The Petty In History appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: Effective leadership requires accurately reading the room of reality and acting accordingly, rather than trying to impose a particular ideology or agenda.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Enable a shift in how we think about leadership and power, opening up new possibilities for collective decision-making and action.
